x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Holder
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity whose checks or payment instructions are being monitored for fraud.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that maintains the account, receives payment instructions, and verifies them against the authorized list.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or organization that is intended to receive the payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee banking operations and fraud prevention practices, ensuring compliance.
